title: Hero shows dynamic collaboration badge and currently learning text
description: Verifies the homepage Hero renders and displays the collaboration badge and currently learning line as visible content.

steps.description: Verify text "Open to collaborate" is visible
Verify text "Currently learning: —" is not visible

title: Hero CTA 'See my work' navigates to Projects
description: Verifies the primary Hero call-to-action routes the user to the Projects page.

title: Hero renders fallback 'Currently learning: —' when settings are unavailable
description: Verifies the Hero can show the default fallback value for the currently learning field when dynamic data cannot be resolved in the UI.

steps.description: Wait for "Currently learning" text to appear
Verify text "Open to collaborate" is visible

title: Hero social links are visible on the homepage
description: Verifies the Hero area exposes social link entry points as visible interactive elements.

title: Achievements page loads with filter pills and masonry grid
description: Verifies the Achievements page renders key UI elements including filter pills and the achievement grid.

steps.description: Verify element "Achievement card thumbnail" is visible

title: Open lightbox from an achievement card thumbnail and close it
description: Verifies clicking a card thumbnail opens a lightbox preview and the user can close it.

steps.description: Verify element "Lightbox full image" is visible

title: Lightbox keyboard close behavior (Escape key)
description: Verifies the lightbox can be dismissed using the Escape key.

title: Graceful handling when lightbox image fails to load
description: Verifies an image error placeholder appears if the full-size image cannot load and the user can exit the lightbox.

steps.description: Click on an "Achievement card thumbnail" known to have a broken or unavailable full image
Verify text "Image failed to load" is visible or verify element "Image error placeholder" is visible

title: Projects page loads and displays the pinned/projects grid
description: Verifies that the Projects page renders a visible projects section with project cards from the primary data source when available.

title: Open a project card to view more details (expanded card/detail view)
description: Verifies that clicking a project card reveals additional visible project information on the Projects page.

title: Project card shows status and tech badges on the Projects page
description: Verifies that a project card displays visible status indicators and technology badges.

title: Fallback mode: projects still display when GitHub data is unavailable
description: Verifies that the Projects page can still render a visible list of projects even if live GitHub data cannot be fetched (manual fallback).

steps.description: Verify text "Live not available" is visible

title: Fallback project with no liveUrl shows 'Live not available' and Live is not actionable
description: Verifies that a project without a live URL communicates the state and does not allow navigating to a live site.

steps.description: Click on a project card that does not have a Live link
Verify text "Live not available" is visible

title: Projects page remains usable after scrolling through multiple cards
description: Verifies that after scrolling the Projects page, project cards remain visible and clickable (basic usability across long lists).

steps.description: Scroll to the bottom of the project grid
Click on a visible project card near the bottom of the grid

title: Guestbook: Post a new message successfully (unauthenticated)
description: Verifies a visitor can submit a guestbook entry and see it appear in the messages list.

steps.description: Type "Test Visitor" into the name field
Type "Hello! Leaving a test message." into the message field
Verify text "Hello! Leaving a test message." is visible

title: Guestbook: Validation error when message is empty, then successful submission after correction
description: Verifies message-required validation is shown and submission succeeds after fixing the input.

steps.description: Type "Test Visitor" into the name field
Type "Now adding the required message." into the message field
Verify text "Now adding the required message." is visible

title: Guestbook: Cybill AI auto-reply appears for a newly submitted message
description: Verifies that after posting, an AI reply is appended/visible for the same entry within a reasonable wait.

steps.description: Type "Test Visitor" into the name field
Type "Can you reply to this guestbook note?" into the message field
Verify text "Can you reply to this guestbook note?" is visible
Wait for the Cybill reply area/text to appear for the new message (up to 30 seconds)

title: Guestbook: Realtime updates show a newly added message without manual refresh
description: Verifies that the guestbook list updates in-session after submission, indicating realtime rendering of the new entry.

steps.description: Verify the guestbook messages list is visible
Type "Realtime Tester" into the name field
Type "Realtime check message." into the message field
Verify text "Realtime check message." is visible

title: Send a chat message and receive an AI response rendered in the conversation
description: Verifies a visitor can send a message in Cybill chat and see an AI response displayed in the chat thread.

steps.description: Type "Hello Cybill—can you summarize what this portfolio site is about?" into the chat input field
Verify text "Hello Cybill—can you summarize what this portfolio site is about?" is visible
Verify an assistant message element is visible in the chat conversation

title: Markdown response displays formatted content (basic formatting)
description: Verifies that markdown in AI responses is rendered as formatted content rather than raw markdown text.

steps.description: Type "Reply using markdown with a heading and a bullet list about your features." into the chat input field
Verify an assistant message element is visible in the chat conversation
Verify an assistant message contains a visible heading-style line (for example, a short title line above other text)
Verify an assistant message contains a visible bulleted list (multiple lines that begin with bullet markers)

title: Clear chat history removes existing messages from the conversation
description: Verifies the Clear chat history action removes previously displayed user and assistant messages.

steps.description: Type "Say hi and include a short two-line reply." into the chat input field
Verify an assistant message element is visible in the chat conversation
Verify text "Say hi and include a short two-line reply." is not visible

title: Send button is disabled or no-op when input is empty
description: Verifies the chat UI prevents sending an empty message.

steps.description: Verify the send button is visible
Verify no new user message appears in the chat conversation
Verify the chat input field is still visible

title: Long message can be sent and displayed without breaking the conversation view
description: Verifies the UI can handle sending a longer prompt and displaying it in the conversation.

steps.description: Type "Please write a detailed explanation (6–10 sentences) of how you would present projects on a portfolio, and include 3 concrete tips." into the chat input field
Verify the long user message text is visible in the chat conversation
Verify an assistant message element is visible in the chat conversation
Scroll to the bottom of the chat conversation
Verify the most recent assistant message is visible

title: Now Playing widget displays current track and artist on the home page
description: Verifies that when a track is currently playing, the Now Playing widget appears and shows track and artist information.

steps.description: Verify element "Now playing widget" is visible

title: Now Playing widget is hidden when no track is currently playing
description: Verifies that when ListenBrainz reports no current track, the widget does not render and no placeholder is shown.

steps.description: Verify element "Now playing widget" is not visible
Verify text "Now playing" is not visible
Verify text "No track" is not visible

title: Now Playing widget does not block core hero content on the home page
description: Verifies that the home hero content remains visible regardless of whether the Now Playing widget is present.

steps.description: Verify element "primary introduction content" is visible
Verify element "Now playing widget" is visible
